assertions.title: Settings sidebar renders Device Profile, Group Profile, Share, Security sections

steps.expected: Settings sidebar with required sections and rows is visible
steps.observed: Sidebar rendered with Settings header, DEVICE PROFILE, GROUP PROFILE, Rotate Share, Export Profile, Export Share, and PROFILE SECURITY sections including Lock/Clear rows.

steps.action: Verify key group metadata and note copy
steps.expected: Created/Updated dates and shared-note text match contract
steps.observed: Created = Feb 24, 2026; Updated = Mar 8, 2026; note text 'Shared across all peers. Synced via Nostr.' present.

evidence.network: GET /demo/dashboard-settings-lock-profile (document) plus Vite module scripts; no failed requests observed in agent-browser logs

assertions.title: Settings sidebar Device Profile lists three relays

steps.action: Inspect relay rows in Device Profile
steps.expected: Exactly three relays in order: primal, damus, nos.lol
steps.observed: Relay remove-button aria labels resolved in order: wss://relay.primal.net, wss://relay.damus.io, wss://nos.lol; add row appears separately below.

evidence.network: Same page-load request set as VAL-DSH-010; no failed requests observed

assertions.title: Settings header uses Share Tech Mono typography

steps.action: Read computed style for visible 'Settings' sidebar header
steps.observed: Computed style returned fontFamily='Inter, system-ui, sans-serif' (fontSize=16px, fontWeight=400).

evidence.network: Same page-load request set as VAL-DSH-010; no failed requests observed

assertions.issues: Typography regression: settings header is using Inter instead of Share Tech Mono.

assertions.title: Peer rows expose trailing ellipsis + play-triangle icons when sidebar open

steps.expected: Each visible peer row shows two trailing icon buttons and both are clickable
steps.observed: DOM contains two trailing buttons per row (Peer #0/#1/#2) with aria labels for actions/open; however direct click attempts fail because the settings sidebar intercepts pointer events over the peer area.

steps.action: Attempt click on 'Peer #0 actions' via agent-browser
steps.observed: Playwright click timed out with repeated 'settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events' errors.

evidence.network: Same page-load request set as VAL-DSH-010; no failed requests observed

assertions.issues: Interactivity regression: trailing peer-row icons are not clickable while settings sidebar is open due overlay interception.

assertions.title: Peer row trailing icons are absent when sidebar is closed

steps.expected: No trailing ellipsis/play buttons in peer rows
steps.observed: For Peer #0/#1/#2, .peer-row-trailing node absent and trailing button count is 0 for each row; only standard dashboard controls remain interactive.

evidence.network: GET /demo/dashboard-running (document) plus Vite module scripts; no failed requests observed

frictions.description: agent-browser interactive snapshot did not list peer trailing icon buttons while settings sidebar was open, even though DOM inspection showed them.
frictions.resolution: Validated icon presence/interactivity via DOM inspection + explicit label-based click attempts; click attempts confirmed pointer interception failure.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-DSH-010, VAL-DSH-011, VAL-DSH-021) and 2 failed (VAL-DSH-012 typography mismatch; VAL-DSH-013 peer trailing icons not clickable while sidebar is open).
